  ⏵⏵ auto mode on (shift+tab to cycle) · esc to interrupt
  ⎿  Bash(earlier tool call result)

● older output line

╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│   You've hit your limit · resets Apr 23, 9pm (Europe/London)         │
│   /extra-usage to finish what you're working on.                     │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
